title: HDFC Chairman Exit, But Will Customer Support Change?
description:
A bilingual English + Tamil microsoap on one question: will the HDFC chairman exit lead to visible customer support improvements, or is it just another show?

This satirical short is framed around my personal experience with forced card reissue, EMI pushing, unwanted HDFC Life and pension policy pitches, and poor coordination between departments.

#HDFC #HDFCBank #CustomerSupport #Banking #Microsoap #Tamil #English #Shorts
pinnedComment: If support had to improve in one place first, what should it be: phone pickup, issue ownership, or stopping forced cross-sell pitches?
